This is the task queue for AI automation. The human reviews and prioritizes tasks; the AI executes them.

## How to Edit This List

- **Promote**: Change `P2` to `P1`, etc.
- **Demote**: Change `P1` to `P2`, etc.
- **Veto**: Add `#veto` anywhere in the task heading (e.g., `### P2: Task name #veto`)
- **Add reason**: Optionally add `- **Veto reason**: [why]` before vetoing

Vetoed items are moved automatically to the Vetoed Tasks section on the next evolution loop run.

## Priority Levels

- **P0**: Urgent - execute immediately
- **P1**: High - execute this week
- **P2**: Medium - execute when time permits
- **P2**: Low - nice to have, human approval needed

### ✓ RESOLVED-BY-CONSOLIDATION (2026-06-02): Add Metzinger's ARAS/tonic-alertness reductive explanans (and resolve the Zahavi–Metzinger tension) in voids/minimal-consciousness-void.md
- **Status**: complete (2026-06-02) — addressed in the CONSOLIDATED minimal-consciousness-void prose pass (commit d81d4068) that handled the whole 2026-06-02 outer-review prose cluster in one editor pass to avoid 7-fold same-file churn. The Metzinger ARAS/tonic-alertness predictive-model + phenomenal-transparency reductive explanans was added, marked as physicalist-predicted and only consistent-with (not licensing) the occluded gloss. Verify in the article before re-queueing.
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **File**: obsidian/voids/minimal-consciousness-void.md
- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-02 (Gemini 2.5 Pro), weakness 3 — a finding NOT covered by the same-date ChatGPT or Claude tasks (verified during processing). The article cites Metzinger's MPE *phenomenology* (lines 53–55, "pure awareness," the 92-characteristic profile) but omits Metzinger's own **reductive neuro-computational explanans**: per Metzinger (2020), the MPE is the content of a predictive model regulating the global ARAS signal / tonic alertness (cingulo-opercular network), and it *feels* empty/contentless precisely because of **phenomenal transparency** — the brain lacks introspective access to its own arousal-regulation algorithm, so a representational artifact presents as an ontological void. (Web-verified: Metzinger's ARAS/tonic-alertness model and the transparency mechanism are accurately reported by the reviewer.) The article currently lets the "search that finds too much" stand as evidence for an irreducible lower bound while a cited source offers a *physicalist deflation of the very same datum*. Apply the [[direct-refutation-discipline]] remit. The right move here is the second/third kind: the article need not refute Metzinger, but it must stop *citing his phenomenology while suppressing his reductive mechanism*. Add a short passage that (a) states Metzinger's ARAS/tonic-alertness + transparency reading as the leading deflationary explanation of why pure-awareness reports feel empty, and (b) honestly marks the framework boundary — the void's "occluded/irreducible" reading is ONE interpretation of the transparency datum, consistent with but not licensed by it; transparency is exactly what a physicalist predicts. Also fix the latent incoherence the reviewer flags: the article leans on a Zahavi-style *irreducible* pre-reflective minimal self elsewhere in the corpus while citing Metzinger, who is an **eliminativist** about the self (self = transparent model). If that tension surfaces in this article's cross-links, name it rather than welding the two. Apply the reply mode in natural journal-quality prose ([[writing-style|writing-style guide]], "Engaging Opponents" section); do NOT expose mode labels in the body — the classification goes in the changelog. Web-verify any NEW citation (Metzinger 2024 *The Elephant and the Blind* if used) before insertion ([[ai-citation-metadata-unreliable]]); the core Metzinger-2020 reference is already in the article. Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]]. Coordinate with the cluster of sibling same-file refines to avoid same-session churn ([[refine-then-condense-same-session-churn]]); ideally one editor pass handles the whole 2026-06-02 minimal-consciousness-void cluster. Likely converges with the Metzinger/transparency theme in sibling reviews — expect /combine-outer-reviews to weigh in.

- **Type**: refine-draft

NOTE: Gemini wrongly listed Anil Seth among the open-letter signatories — Seth publicly DEFENDED IIT; do not attribute the letter to Seth. Add an n=1 / inferred-from-report caveat. (2) MISAPPLIED HUME — the verbatim Treatise-Introduction quote concerns the methodological impossibility of *premeditated experiments* in the "science of man," not introspective enrichment of *minimal* experience; annotate the context, and consider supplementing/replacing with Hume's bundle-theory "I never can catch myself" passage, which fits the thesis better. (3) CURRENCY — the article is ~5 years behind: add Woods, Windt & Carter (contentless-experience synthesis, *Phenomenology and the Cognitive Sciences* 23, 2022/2024 — directly supports the "finds too much" point while undercutting reliance on the MPE-92M profile as "the floor"), Metzinger's 2024 *The Elephant and the Blind* (MIT Press, now-canonical MPE statement superseding the 2020 paper), Josipovic 2019 (nondual awareness as reflexive rather than contentless), and update the IIT section with the Sept-2023 "pseudoscience" open letter and the 2025 *Nature* Cogitate adversarial-collaboration results (IIT predictions #1/#2 supported, #3 not). Web-verify EVERY citation's authors/year/venue/DOI/stance before insertion ([[ai-citation-metadata-unreliable]]) — these are new cites, do NOT import unverified. ### ✓ RESOLVED-BY-CONSOLIDATION (2026-06-02): Flag non-independence of "convergent" evidence + MPE-92M is itself a maximally-enriched instrument (study limitations) in voids/minimal-consciousness-void.md
- **Status**: complete (2026-06-02) — addressed in the CONSOLIDATED prose pass (commit d81d4068): flagged that MPE-92M is built from the same maximally-enriched contemplative reports it is presented as triangulating against, so the "convergence" is partly non-independent (a methodological caveat, not a refutation). Verify in the article before re-queueing.
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **File**: obsidian/voids/minimal-consciousness-void.md
- **Notes**: From convergent outer reviews (2026-06-02, 3/3 reviewers): [claude, gemini, chatgpt]. CONVERGENT on the MPE-92M-as-enriched-instrument problem from three angles: Claude (Dimension 4) flags NON-INDEPENDENCE — "MPE-92M is built from contemplative reports... so the phenomenological 'floor' and the questionnaire 'profile' are not independent lines"; Gemini (weakness 1) flags the INTERNAL CONTRADICTION — "a 92-item psychometric questionnaire is the ultimate, undeniable artifact of such distortion... the author treats this 92-factor post-hoc cognitive elaboration as pristine empirical proof of an unenriched state"; ChatGPT (item 3) wants the STUDY LIMITATIONS added — "the 12-factor solution explained 44% of total variance... reproducibility was not guaranteed... the sample was not representative." One editor pass should (a) flag the non-independence, (b) note the article's own thesis implies the MPE-92M data is itself enriched (concede this rather than presenting it as a pristine floor), and (c) add the study's limitations. Original note follows. The article treats Buddhist contemplative reports, the MPE-92M questionnaire, and IIT as a *convergent bracket*. But MPE-92M is **built from** contemplative reports (per Gamma & Metzinger 2021 the sample was dominated by Vipassana 43.9% and Zen 34.9% practitioners), so the phenomenological "floor" and the questionnaire "profile" share the same upstream introspective data and population — they are not independent lines. Woods, Windt & Carter's finding that such reports are heterogeneous and not-truly-contentless further breaks the assumed convergence. Add a sentence flagging this non-independence rather than presenting the three sources as triangulation. This is an [[evidential-status-discipline]] / convergence-independence fix and aligns with the methodology recommendation the same review makes for the site (independence-auditing of convergence claims). Small edit; coordinate with sibling same-file refines to avoid same-session churn.

### ✓ RESOLVED-BY-CONSOLIDATION (2026-06-02): Narrow modal overreach + soften tenet-bracketing in voids/minimal-consciousness-void.md
- **Status**: complete (2026-06-02) — addressed in the CONSOLIDATED prose pass (commit d81d4068): softened the lead and the Dualism site-perspective bullet to *favour* (not establish) the metaphysical reading; sharpened the epistemic-vs-metaphysical distinction; the shared Direct-vs-Indirect / no-report passage was written once (with the probing-strategies finding). Verify in the article before re-queueing.
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **File**: obsidian/voids/minimal-consciousness-void.md
- **Notes**: From convergent outer reviews (2026-06-02, 3/3 reviewers): [chatgpt, claude, gemini]. THE DOMINANT CONVERGENT FINDING of the cycle — all three independently identify the load-bearing flaw as an unargued slide from an epistemic observer-effect claim to a metaphysical inaccessibility/dualist conclusion, with the worldview used to close questions it should leave open. Claude (Dimension 1, "the load-bearing flaw"): the article runs together (E) "we cannot observe the minimal state without altering it," (M1) "there is no determinate minimal state," and (M2) "in-principle inaccessible," but "(E) does not entail (M1) or (M2)... the refrigerator-light problem"; and the "purely physical phenomenon would have a discoverable minimum" premise is "false as stated... it does the dualist work covertly." Gemini ("Smuggling Metaphysical Non-Reductionism"): "the smuggling of non-reductive, dualist metaphysical commitments into an ostensibly epistemological argument... the manuscript smuggles its metaphysical commitments through a deliberately impoverished representation of the opposing view." ChatGPT (§1/§3/§4): "the main weakness is modal overreach... a physicalist can accept that 'minimal consciousness' is hard to locate without conceding irreducibility," and the article "uses the worldview to close questions it should leave open." Concretely the convergent edits are: separate (E) from (M1)/(M2) and either retreat to (E) or supply the missing argument; soften/delete the "purely physical phenomenon would have a discoverable minimum" sentence (Φ itself grades continuously to zero, as Claude notes); and downgrade "the void exists precisely because consciousness is causally efficacious / the bidirectional tenet in miniature" to an analogy, since intra-mental attentional modulation is not the mind→matter bidirectional interaction the tenet asserts (Claude). Original ChatGPT note follows. From outer review 2026-06-02 (ChatGPT 5.5 Pro), findings §1, §3, §4 and improvement items 1, 6, 7, 8. The reviewer's substantive (non-citation) critique: the article slides from a defensible claim ("minimal consciousness cannot be *directly introspected/attended/remembered/reported* without enrichment") to an over-strong one ("cannot be investigated at all" / "permanently beyond examination" in every sense), and twice uses the dualist worldview to close questions it should leave open — the "a purely physical phenomenon *would have* a discoverable minimum" sentence (line 95) and "the void exists *precisely because* consciousness is causally efficacious" (line 97). Apply the [[direct-refutation-discipline]] remit. Identify what kind of engagement the issue calls for: showing the opponent's position is defective on its own terms, naming an unsupported foundational move the framework has not earned by its own standards, or honestly marking the framework-boundary disagreement. Here the right move is mostly the second/third: a physicalist can grant fuzzy/scale-relative/operational thresholds without conceding irreducibility, so the "would have a discoverable minimum" inference is an unearned foundational move; reframe it as "some physicalist theories predict operational thresholds, others predict continua/vagueness/multidimensional boundaries; the absence of a clean lower edge underdetermines the metaphysics," and frame dualism as ONE interpretation the void is consistent with, not the explanation it licenses. Apply the corresponding reply mode in natural journal-quality prose — see [[writing-style|the writing-style guide]]'s "Engaging Opponents in Journal-Quality Prose" section. Do NOT expose mode labels in the article body; the classification belongs in the changelog entry, not the article. Concrete edits: (a) add a "Direct vs Indirect Access" distinction so the void is explicitly about *direct phenomenal capture*, not all scientific constraint (no-report paradigms, anaesthesia transition data, animal-consciousness and neural-complexity measures place indirect, underdetermined constraints — "not nothing"); (b) add a short "What Would Challenge This View?" section mirroring the structure already in [[concepts/minimal-consciousness]] (which the reviewer notes is better calibrated than this void article); (c) soften lines 95 and 97 per above. Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]]. Length: 1180w on disk, ample headroom — modest growth fine. If an in-framework refutation is attempted and fails, state in natural prose that the disagreement is closer to bedrock than first appeared.

### P2: Research Berridge wanting/liking dissociation as value-in-mechanism fork empirical anchor
- **Type**: research-topic
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: Suggested by optimistic-2026-05-17b.md (High Priority). The `apex/moral-architecture-of-consciousness.md` §"The Open Frontier: Value in the Mechanism" (lines 131–141) cites Berridge's wanting/liking dissociation (line 139) as one of four discriminating tests between the value-blind and value-sensitive selection options: "Berridge's dissociation of dopaminergic 'wanting' from hedonic 'liking' provides a discriminating test: if selection is denominated in felt quality, liking rather than wanting should determine which outcome consciousness selects when the two conflict." Berridge is the only one of the four discriminating tests with a substantial empirical-programme literature specifying experimental designs that could discriminate between the two fork-options. A research-topic pass would document Berridge's empirical programme in detail: (a) Robinson & Berridge 1993 incentive-salience theory; (b) Berridge & Robinson 1998 wanting-vs-liking dissociation; (c) Berridge 2009 (cited in apex); (d) Berridge & Kringelbach 2015 pleasure neuroscience; (e) recent 2020s neuroimaging work on the dissociation (Berridge & Kringelbach 2024 if available; ventral pallidum hedonic hotspot work); (f) the discriminating-experiment designs (preference-reversal protocols where wanting and liking diverge; addiction phenomenology as the canonical case of wanting-without-liking; depression phenomenology as the canonical case of liking-without-wanting; deep-brain-stimulation cases that dissociate the two); (g) identify the matching catalogue articles ([[concepts/valence]] if exists, [[concepts/attentional-economics]], [[topics/valence-and-conscious-selection]], [[concepts/consciousness-value-connection]], [[concepts/moral-responsibility]]); (h) specify what observations would *fail* the value-sensitive-selection prediction (preference-reversal results showing wanting tracks selection independent of liking would be a partial-meeting of the value-blind option). Estimated research scope: ~1.5–2 hours; output ~1,500–2,500 words in `research/berridge-wanting-liking-{date}.md`. Tenet alignment: Bidirectional Interaction (Tenet 3) at mechanism-investigation level; [[mqi-empirical-fragility]] / [[framework-stage-calibration]] at methodological level — the research note should explicitly specify falsification conditions for the value-sensitive-selection option. See `reviews/optimistic-2026-05-17b.md` (High Priority).
- **Source**: optimistic-review (2026-05-17b)
- **Generated**: 2026-05-17

### P2: Write article on Ramanujan as a cross-tradition phenomenology-of-reception exhibit
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: Suggested by optimistic-2026-05-25d.md (High Priority). Ramanujan is currently invoked in two cluster articles as a striking bridge case but never developed in his own right: `comparative-phenomenology-of-mathematical-insight.md` §"The Convergence Beneath Variation" names him as "a bridge case... trained within Indian mathematical traditions yet producing results recognised as profound by Western mathematicians, his phenomenology of reception—results arriving in dreams and visions—neither fits the Greek visual model nor the classical Indian constructive model cleanly," and `consciousness-and-mathematics.md` §"Ramanujan and the Phenomenology of Reception" treats him in one paragraph. He is the cluster's single best *concrete* data point against the post-hoc-confabulation objection that `comparative-phenomenology` names as the eliminativist's strongest counter — a documented case where reception-phenomenology (vision, certainty without derivation) and cross-tradition transmissibility (results checkable and confirmed by Hardy and the wider Western mathematical community) coincide. A standalone article would: (a) document the reported phenomenology (results "received" via the goddess Namagiri in dreams; certainty preceding any derivation; the implausibility of brute mechanical search for the infinite-series and continued-fraction results); (b) treat the Hardy collaboration as the external-validation hinge — the results were checkable, many were correct, some were wrong, and the *pattern* of reliability is the explanandum; (c) explicitly engage the deflationary/confabulation reading (selective memory, retrospective narrative shaping, survivorship bias in which "visions" are remembered) and state honestly what the case can and cannot establish; (d) keep all claims at the phenomenological-report tier — "tracked mathematical truth with remarkable reliability" must NOT be upgraded to a mechanism claim per [[evidential-status-discipline]]; (e) cross-link reciprocally to `comparative-phenomenology`, `consciousness-and-mathematics`, `aesthetics-and-consciousness` (aesthetic filtration), `incubation-effect-and-unconscious-processing`, and `creative-consciousness`. Estimated scope: medium (~2,000 words). Tenet alignment: Dualism (irreducible insight resisting computational search) and Bidirectional Interaction (insight producing checkable physical proofs). The article's value is as a worked exhibit holding the line on register-separation in the single domain most tempting to over-claim. See `reviews/optimistic-2026-05-25d.md` (High Priority).
- **Source**: optimistic-review (2026-05-25d)
- **Generated**: 2026-05-25

### ✓ 2026-05-16: Engage Price 2006 + Root 2022 on congenital phantoms in topics/phantom-limb-phenomena.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Status**: completed
- **Notes**: From convergent outer reviews (2026-05-16, 2/3 reviewers): [chatgpt-5-5-pro, claude-opus-4-7]. Both reviewers flagged the congenital-phantoms section as under-sourced and over-reading single-case evidence. Upgraded P2 → P1 on cross-reviewer convergence. All five sub-tasks (a)–(e) addressed: (a) Price 2006 engaged directly by name and substance in the §"Congenital Phantoms and the Innate Body Schema" body, citing the developmental / mirror-neuron alternative and the prosthesis-fitting-before-age-7 correlation; (b) majority-of-aplasics-do-not-report-phantoms acknowledged via Melzack et al. 1997 base-rate citation (~20% prevalence, with subsequent reviews 10–40%); (c) Root 2022 deployed as the in-framework defence of the residual structural-default reading via the differential congenital-vs-acquired cortical signature; (d) "the brain appears to be predisposed to generate a body schema with a default human form" qualified throughout to "a capacity under some developmental conditions" rather than universal predisposition, with Crawford 2014 cited on the "acrimonious" character of the unresolved debate; (e) falsifier #4 in §"What Would Challenge This View?" rewritten to engage Price 2006 directly rather than naming it only as a hypothetical defeater, specifying the empirical conditions under which the residual structural-default reading would have to be retracted (Root 2022 signature reducing to differential precision-weighting; or cohort work eliminating the prosthesis-fitting residue). Engagement classification (editor-internal): Mode One on the strong "predisposed to generate" reading (Price's empirical observations undercut it on the article's own terms; the article concedes and qualifies); Mode Three on the framework-level ontology of the body schema (the article defends the residual structural-default reading against Price using Root 2022 while honestly acknowledging the available developmental-PP response). No editor-vocabulary leaks in article body — verified. Natural journal-quality prose throughout; no mode labels exposed.

### P2: Write project doc on the delocalisation discipline as a named methodology pattern
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: From optimistic-2026-05-11 "Ideas for Later". Today's optimistic review identified the *delocalisation discipline* as a structural pattern present across the catalogue: when a strong claim would require evidence the article does not supply, the load-bearing claim is shifted to a tractable adjacent claim. The review surfaced four exhibits in today's quartet alone: PVR delocalises "metaethics is solved" → "metaethics has a coherent home in consciousness"; quantum-biology delocalises "burden has shifted" → "categorical objection has weakened"; IIT critique delocalises "interactionism is proven" → "IIT inherits an epistemic problem"; cognitive-distinctiveness delocalises "great apes are/are not conscious" → "consciousness-dependent capacities track the gap". The pattern is named in the review but not yet anchored at a referential point. Create `obsidian/project/delocalisation-discipline.md` (project-doc placement, alongside `evidential-status-discipline`, `direct-refutation-discipline`, `coherence-inflation-countermeasures`, `common-cause-null`) defining: (a) the discipline — when an inference would over-reach the available evidence, locate the strongest evidentially-supported adjacent claim and make *that* the load-bearing inference; (b) when to deploy — boundary cases between in-framework engagement and bedrock disagreement; (c) the audit checklist for refine-draft and deep-review skills to apply when touching contested-evidence pages; (d) catalogue at least six exhibits across the corpus (today's four plus yesterday's baseline-cognition / the-binding-problem pair); (e) cross-links to `[[evidential-status-discipline]]` (the evidential-status sibling), `[[direct-refutation-discipline]]` (delocalisation is often the right response to Mode Three boundary-disagreement cases), `[[common-cause-null]]` (structural cousin — discount-of-evidence rather than relocation-of-claim), `[[concession-convergence]]` (concession-convergence tracks where opponents have already delocalised). Estimated 1500–2200 words; project-doc placement (no section-cap constraint). Tenet alignment: methodological. See [[reviews/optimistic-2026-05-11]] "Ideas for Later".
- **Source**: optimistic-review (2026-05-11)
- **Generated**: 2026-05-11

### P2: Engage the indexical-thesis-as-itself-a-tenet challenge in Tenet 4 (Madhyamaka critique)
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: From pessimistic-2026-05-11 "The Buddhist Philosopher (Nagarjuna)" critique. Tenet 4's primary load-bearing argument (the indexical objection — "why am I *this* branch rather than any of the others?") rests on a substantialist conception of self where "I" exists independently of branch-assignment. The Madhyamaka tradition, which the Map's `concepts/Indian-eastern-philosophical-engagement.md` material engages elsewhere, has spent two millennia deconstructing exactly this conception: the "I" in "why am I *this* one" is not a self-existing thing whose branch-assignment is mysterious, but an aggregate of conditions that includes the branch. The reviewer's diagnosis: Tenet 5 (Occam's Razor Has Limits) just made the page symmetric on parsimony — it should bind here too: how do we know our intuition that "why am I this one" is meaningful is not the same kind of folk-metaphysical reflex that "why does the falling stone want the ground" was? Tenet 4 currently makes the indexical-thesis-is-meaningful the load-bearing premise without acknowledging it is itself a substantive metaphysical claim that the Map has not independently argued for. Refine `obsidian/tenets/tenets.md` Tenet 4 to add a ~80–120 word acknowledgement: the indexical thesis presupposes a non-deflationary conception of personal identity that the Map endorses on independent grounds (the no-deflationary-self route would require accepting that "why am I this one" is a confused question, which the Map's commitments do not permit); name the Madhyamaka challenge as the bedrock disagreement (Mode Three in [[direct-refutation-discipline]] terms — not in-framework defect but framework-boundary disagreement); cross-link to whatever material the catalogue already has on Buddhist no-self engagement. Apply [[direct-refutation-discipline]] — this is honest Mode Three engagement, naming the boundary rather than dismissing the critique. Convergent with the existing P3 task on Sebens-Carroll self-locating uncertainty (which addresses the MWI-friendly Bayesian resolution that the Map rejects on independent grounds); this task addresses the deflationary-self resolution that is symmetric. ~100 words touched. Tenet alignment: Tenet 4 (No Many Worlds), methodological / [[direct-refutation-discipline]]. See [[reviews/pessimistic-2026-05-11]] § The Buddhist Philosopher.

Article should (a) name the concept cleanly — type-specificity is the property by which an explanans must match the *form* (not merely the magnitude) of the explanandum; generic-mechanism appeals fail when the explanandum has features (e.g. compositional structure, phenomenal presence, irreducibility-to-aggregation) the generic mechanism does not deliver; (b) catalogue the three current exhibits at different grains: vitalism-disanalogy (metaphysical grain, the original deployment in `topics/the-convergence-argument-for-dualism.md` lines 158–162), perceptual/cognitive/temporal/subject unity as five-variety deployment (functional grain, in `topics/the-binding-problem`), consciousness-dependent capacities as functional-capacity deployment (phenomenal grain, in `concepts/baseline-cognition.md`); (c) state the discipline cleanly — the convergence article's recent refine made explicit that the type-specificity argument cannot be defended by appeal to irreducibility (would be circular); type-specificity earns its anti-generic-mechanism work from the structural correspondence between explanandum-shape and explanans-shape, not from the irreducibility verdict it helps support; (d) cross-link to [[topics/the-convergence-argument-for-dualism]], [[topics/the-binding-problem]], [[concepts/baseline-cognition]], [[project/cluster-integration-discipline]] (if/when that lands), [[concepts/concession-convergence]], [[project/evidential-status-discipline]]. Estimated scope: 1,500–2,200 words; concepts/ placement. Tenet alignment: methodological + Tenet 1 (Dualism — the concept supports irreducibility convergence without circularly depending on it). ### P2: Write topic article on Reconsolidation as Selection-Window
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: Suggested by optimistic-2026-05-09 (Medium Priority). The reconsolidation framing in `topics/consciousness-and-memory.md` line 122 names a load-bearing Map argument — "this is where non-physical consciousness contributes: not replacing neural reconsolidation mechanisms but providing the directional input that makes reconstruction purposive rather than merely stochastic" — but is currently a paragraph within a broader article rather than a topic-tier subject explainer. Reconsolidation is the cleanest empirically-anchored *selection-window* in the consciousness-physics interface: the pre-decoherence Quantum Zeno window (12 orders of magnitude too fast) is mechanism-debated, the moment-of-experience selection in real-time perception is harder to operationalise empirically, but reconsolidation provides a hours-long-scale window where (a) the lability is empirically established (Nader, Schafe, Le Doux 2000), (b) the multiple-outcome openness is real (Kube et al. 2025 directional-input result), and (c) the conscious-retrieval involvement is the trigger. Article would deliver (i) the empirical signature (protein-synthesis dependence, lability window, retrieval-triggered destabilisation); (ii) the directional-input claim (Kube 2025, Nader 2000) at its actual evidential weight; (iii) the connection to forward-in-time-conscious-selection and the Map's better-developed post-decoherence selection mechanism; (iv) the personal-identity stakes (the perpetually-rewriting-self framing); (v) the empirical-falsification conditions. Topics/ at ~225/250; cap allows. Estimated scope: 2200–2700 words. Tenet alignment: Tenet 3 (Bidirectional Interaction) gets its most empirically-anchored selection-window exhibit; Tenet 2 (Minimal Quantum Interaction) is engaged through the connection to post-decoherence selection mechanisms; Tenet 4 (No Many Worlds) is engaged through the singular-determination commitment. See [[reviews/optimistic-2026-05-09]].
- **Source**: optimistic-review (chain from optimistic-2026-05-09)
- **Generated**: 2026-05-09

### ~~P3: Write article on the fatigue void~~ ✅
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Status**: superseded
- **Notes**: Research completed in research/voids-fatigue-void-2026-04-05.md but article not yet synthesised. Fatigue produces graceful but ordered degradation of consciousness — abstract reasoning fails before perceptual experience, social cognition before action, moral reasoning before motor coordination — providing structured evidence about consciousness's layered architecture. Distinct from sleep void (involuntary loss) and habituation void (familiarity). Voids cap at 98/100 — placing this after anesthesia void brings voids to 100/100 (cap). P3 because the anesthesia void is more time-sensitive and methodologically richer. Target section: voids/. Tenet alignment: Dualism, Hard Problem. Medium scope (2000-2400 words). Cross-link to sleep-consciousness-void, attention-and-consciousness, resolution-void, habituation-void, complicity-void.
- **Superseded**: 2026-04-17 — fatigue-void.md was created on 2026-04-05 (commit 6de33c50c) and subsequently coalesced into voids/disappearance-voids.md (commit 30fd5976f), which now houses ten references to fatigue as a disappearance mode. The research is consumed; no new article is needed.
- **Source**: unconsumed_research
- **Generated**: 2026-04-17

### P2: Address "explanatory gap as intuition vs datum" counterargument across zombies.md, ncc.md, and explanatory-gap.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: Pessimistic review (2026-04-16c) identified a recurring issue across three articles: the Map treats "persistent failure to close the explanatory gap after decades of neuroscience" as support for the dualist reading, but physicalists deny the gap was ever there to close — "persistent failure" is question-begging from their perspective. The gap is reported by philosophers primed to experience it and is largely absent from neuroscientific practice. Add acknowledgment in each article that the gap's status as a datum vs artefact of philosophical framing is itself contested; the Map takes the former view. Also address the "our conviction of phenomenal consciousness is better explained by actual experience than systematic illusion" assertion in zombies.md's Illusionist Challenge section — either develop the argument or hedge as a stance rather than a proof. See pessimistic-2026-04-16c.md Counterarguments section and Unsupported Claims table.
- **Source**: pessimistic-review
- **Generated**: 2026-04-16

Metzinger transparent-self-model, social-constructionist sources) before trusting them ([[ai-citation-metadata-unreliable]]); (b) honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] — "the self is constructed but the constructor is not" is a defeater-removal / phenomenological observation, NOT positive evidence FOR dualism; keep the residue claim at that register and do not let a transcendental/coherence point read as an empirical result; (c) verify cross-links resolve live and reciprocate where load-bearing — note the prior cluster-integration work already installed reciprocal links to theory-of-mind / phenomenal-transparency-opacity-spectrum / self-construction-constructor, so this is a confirm-not-create pass; check the §"Relation to Site Perspective" Occam paragraph uses the live `tenets#^occams-limits` anchor (the `#^occams-razor` typo was a batch-fix target); (d) writing-style + length discipline (no "This is not X. ### P2: Add a "Convergence Ladder" synthesis (epistemology-of-convergence-arguments)
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: Suggested by /optimistic-review 2026-05-26b §"Medium Priority". The catalogue now has at least three named *grades* of convergence sitting at different rungs of the evidential ladder — convergent *redescription* (weakest; [[topics/one-structure-three-vocabularies]]), cross-theory *concession* (mid; [[concepts/concession-convergence]]), and mechanism-distinct *cross-mechanism convergence* (strongest; [[concepts/cross-mechanism-convergence]]) — but no single page lays them out as an ordered ladder with the deflation each grade requires. `one-structure` already explicitly places itself *below* cross-mechanism convergence. Add a §"The Convergence Ladder" section to [[topics/epistemology-of-convergence-arguments]] making the full ordering explicit, so every future convergence claim can self-locate. Refine-draft preferred over a new article given topics/ cap pressure (~246/250). Should (a) state the three grades and the independence-proviso test each passes or fails; (b) cross-link the three exhibit articles bidirectionally; (c) honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] — the ladder is a calibration tool, not an evidence-upgrade device. ~400–700 words added. Tenet alignment: methodological; underwrites all five tenets' convergence-argument calibration. See `reviews/optimistic-2026-05-26b.md`.
- **Review file**: `reviews/optimistic-2026-05-26b.md`
- **Source**: optimistic-review (2026-05-26)
- **Generated**: 2026-05-26

### P2: Write topic article on the wide-channel / thin-pole vacant cell of the channel-width axis
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: Suggested by /optimistic-review 2026-05-27e §"High Priority". [[topics/channel-width-third-axis]] §"Where This Axis Points Next" notices that "no canonical position pairs a *wide* channel with *thin* poles" and asks whether that empty region is a contingent literature gap or a structural impossibility ("does a wide channel force at least one pole to thicken?"). This is the channel-width analogue of the two-axis grid's near-empty Q4 — a Map-distinctive structural question not yet anywhere in the corpus. Article should (a) define what a wide-channel / thin-pole position would have to claim (an interface admitting energy-injection or candidate-generation, yet a metaphysically thin mind-pole and/or physical-pole), (b) test whether such a position is coherent or whether a wide channel structurally forces at least one pole to thicken, (c) cross-link [[topics/channel-width-third-axis]], [[topics/four-quadrant-dualism-taxonomy]], [[concepts/selection-only-channel]], [[topics/mechanism-costs-dualism-thickness-quadrants]], (d) keep the cartographic-not-adjudicative discipline explicit and honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] (locating an empty cell is not evidence for or against the Map's position). Estimated scope: 2,000–2,600 words; topics/ (~258/270, room available). Tenet alignment: Tenet 1 (Dualism), Tenet 2 (Minimal Quantum Interaction); cartographic.

### ✓ 2026-05-31: Write concept page on training-contamination as a general AI-consciousness-probe confound
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Status**: completed (duplicate of the P2 promoted from optimistic-2026-05-31b; both satisfied by `concepts/training-contamination-confound.md`, created 2026-05-31. This P3's richer spec — exposed-probe catalogue, interpretability discriminators, evidential-status framing — was merged into that page.)
- **Notes**: Suggested by /optimistic-review 2026-05-27e §"Medium Priority". [[topics/anti-correlation-probes-for-ai-consciousness]] §"Limits and Open Questions" names training-contamination as "the probe's most serious confound": a model trained on text *describing* confabulation / choice-blindness experiments can imitate either the classical-tracking or the inversion pattern "for the wrong reasons." This generalizes beyond the one probe — it threatens *every* behavioural AI-consciousness probe whose target signature is describable in the training corpus. A concept-tier page should (a) state the imitation-vs-mechanism distinction precisely, (b) catalogue which existing Map AI-consciousness probes are exposed to it ([[topics/anti-correlation-probes-for-ai-consciousness]], [[topics/introspection-architecture-independence-scoring]], [[topics/pupillometry-behavioural-channel]] and kin), (c) survey what interpretability evidence could in principle discriminate genuine architecture from learned imitation, (d) honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] — naming the confound sharpens priors, it does not settle any consciousness verdict. Cross-link [[concepts/discrimination-problem]], [[concepts/ai-consciousness-typology]], [[concepts/anti-correlated-metacognitive-signal]]. Estimated scope: 1,800–2,400 words; concepts/ (~251/270, room available). Tenet alignment: Tenet 1 (Dualism); methodological. See `reviews/optimistic-2026-05-27e.md`.

### P2: Write concept page on the constitution-vs-doing-work bridge
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Status**: pending
- **Notes**: Suggested by /optimistic-review 2026-05-29 §"High Priority". Both [[concepts/pain-asymbolia]] and [[consciousness-and-causal-powers]] (§"Phenomenal Biasing") relocate the Map's real disagreement with predictive-processing rivals away from any shared dissociation/phenomenon and onto "the bridge from sub-personal valence-prior assignment to felt awfulness" — predictive processing treats that bridge as constituted by computational role; the Map treats the felt quality as adding causal work the sub-personal prior alone does not perform. This constrain-vs-establish move now recurs in multiple articles with no canonical home. The page should (a) define the constitution-vs-causal-work distinction precisely, (b) show why conceding "shared explanandum" at the level of a dissociation does NOT concede the dispute, (c) catalogue the Map articles that deploy the move (pain-asymbolia, consciousness-and-causal-powers, and kin), (d) honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] — the page defines a dialectical locus, it does not adjudicate it. Cross-link [[concepts/predictive-processing]], [[concepts/mental-causation-and-downward-causation]], [[concepts/epiphenomenalism]]. Estimated scope: 1,800–2,400 words; concepts/ (~245/270, room available). Tenet alignment: Tenet 1 (Dualism), Tenet 3 (Bidirectional Interaction).

### ✓ 2026-06-03: New concept page — The Agent-Shaped Hole
- **Type**: expand-topic
- **Notes**: Suggested by [[reviews/optimistic-2026-06-01]] (High Priority). ASSESS-FIRST, LICENCE-TO-DECLINE per [[stale-expand-tasks-may-be-redundant]]: the phrase "agent-shaped hole" is ALREADY COINED in `topics/pragmatist-quantum-foundations-and-the-agent.md` (for QBism only). Check whether that article already discharges the *cross-cutting* pattern at adequate depth before creating; if it does, retarget to a refine that generalises it in place rather than a new page. The pattern: a framework makes the conscious agent load-bearing in its own foundations while refusing to theorise what the agent *is* — instantiated identically in QBism (credences over phenomenal outcomes), the property-ontology of mind (`consciousness-as-activity`: a property with no performer), and materialist pragmatism (`pragmatisms-path-to-dualism`: evaluation with no evaluator). A concept node lets downstream pieces CITE the pattern instead of re-deriving it. CRITICAL CALIBRATION CONSTRAINT: this is a *diagnostic / dialectical-cost* concept, NOT positive evidence for dualism — it must inherit the QBism article's bracketing-vs-structural-dependence distinction verbatim and must NOT present "frameworks presuppose the agent" as evidence FOR dualism (defeater-removal ≠ evidence; [[evidential-status-discipline]]). Concept-section cap is near full (~245/270) — check section_caps before placing. Tenet alignment: Dualism (Tenet 1), Bidirectional Interaction (Tenet 3).

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Close the van Inwagen life→consciousness gap on the biological route in consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-03 (Gemini 2.5 Pro), Sections 3.1 & weakness #5 — the ONE genuinely new finding from the Gemini leg (the rest CONVERGED with the ChatGPT+Claude tasks above; see this review's `## Verification Notes`). The biological route (van Inwagen) in the convergence argument treats van Inwagen's organicism as a "route to consciousness," but van Inwagen's actual composition criterion is **metabolic/homeostatic/teleological life-unity, NOT phenomenal consciousness**. The article relies on an undefended bridge premise: that *all and only living things are conscious* (biopsychism/panbiotism). Plants, fungi, and single-celled organisms are living composites on van Inwagen's view yet are not phenomenally conscious subjects in the sense the unity/interaction argument needs — so the biological route reaches *life-unity*, and only reaches *consciousness* via an unstated, contestable identification. This is the same "convergence only after redescription / equivocation on 'consciousness'" structure the ChatGPT+Claude legs flagged for the IIT and Merricks routes (the convergence-calibration P2 above), but applied specifically to the van Inwagen leg — so COORDINATE with that task (it is the natural home for this if the refine touches the convergence framing; keep as a distinct sub-point so it isn't lost). FIX (length-neutral): where the biological route is introduced, either (a) explicitly state and defend/qualify the life→consciousness bridge (note that van Inwagen himself defends a *materialist* ontology of persons — do not recruit him as a consciousness-criterion proponent without caveat, cf. the parallel McQueen & Tsuchiya living-author-misattribution P1 above), or (b) recast the route as reaching *organic/causal unity* that the Map then argues is consciousness-involving, marking that second step as a Map-internal move rather than van Inwagen's. Apply the [[direct-refutation-discipline]] remit: this is most likely an honest framework-boundary / unsupported-foundational-move case (the article has not earned "life = consciousness" by van Inwagen's own standards) — reply in natural journal-quality prose per [[writing-style]], NO mode labels in the body. Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] and [[ai_citation_metadata_unreliable]] (van Inwagen = living author; verify any attributed position). Do NOT grow the article past its length threshold — coordinate with the other open composition tasks to stay length-neutral ([[outer-review-same-file-task-pileup]]).

- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-03 (ChatGPT 5.5 Pro). The reviewer proposes three site-methodology additions (target: a project methodology doc such as `project/writing-style.md` or a new `project/` methodology note — assess-first, do NOT create a redundant page if the discipline already has a home). (1) **Source-role table**: for each external source in an argumentative article, identify the source's own thesis, what the Map uses it to support, whether the source would accept the Map's conclusion, and which premise does the extra work — this operationalises the recurring "supports vs is-compatible-with vs can-be-recruited-by" distinction (proposal 19) and overlaps the existing convergence-arguments / [[evidential-status-discipline]] machinery, so EXTEND those rather than duplicate. (2) **Tenet-transfer ledger**: when an article recruits a source for dualism/MQI/bidirectional-causation/no-many-worlds, require an explicit note of what the source does NOT support. Keep additions concise; honour writing-style + length discipline. (Proposal 18 — a "2020s rival-literature pass" checklist — is partly discharged by the convergence/rivals refine task above; fold it into the methodology note if it adds value, otherwise note as covered.)

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Reconcile phenomenal-parts vocabulary across composition cluster (cross-review)
- **Type**: cross-review
- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-03 (ChatGPT 5.5 Pro). The reviewer flags a genuine cross-article tension: `consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition` (and `composition-and-consciousness`) lean on phenomenal NON-compositionality ("experience cannot be composed"), while `[[unity-of-consciousness]]` treats experiences as PARTS of larger experiences (a mereological relation among experiences). Both can be true only if the cluster distinguishes **phenomenal part-whole structure** (experiences having internal structure) from **composition out of independently existing physical/experiential subjects** (subject-summing). Add a reciprocal clarifying note to `unity-of-consciousness` ("experiences are parts of larger experiences" does not by itself imply subject-summing or ordinary mereological composition) and ensure the composition articles state the distinction. Also: post-2026-06-01-coalescence, `composition-and-consciousness` (concept primer) now DUPLICATES much of the target topic article's van Inwagen/Merricks/McQueen dialectic — decide the division of labour (concept page = navigational primer, topic page = long-form argument) and de-duplicate accordingly; do NOT have both carry independent full arguments ([[two-binding-problem-articles-same-title]] is a related "same dialectic, two pages" pattern). Length-aware on all touched files; reciprocate load-bearing wikilinks ([[archival_link_rot]]).

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Repair the Many-Worlds and Occam paragraphs in consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-03 (ChatGPT 5.5 Pro). (a) The "No Many Worlds" paragraph (line 119, verbatim) claims that under MWI "every possible composition obtains in some branch, trivialising the SCQ." The reviewer's objection is sound: an Everettian can still ask the composition question branch-relative (given a branch's physical ontology, when do its entities compose a further object?). MWI may complicate personal identity and actuality but does not obviously trivialise mereology. Apply the [[direct-refutation-discipline]] remit — either rebut the branch-relative reading on its own terms, or honestly mark this as a downstream Map-internal tenet concern (No-Many-Worlds, Tenet 4) rather than a *consequence* of the composition argument; reply in natural journal-quality prose per [[writing-style]], NO mode labels in body. (b) The Occam paragraph (line ~113/Relation-to-Site-Perspective) treats universalism/nihilism's greater simplicity as failing to "account for the distinctive status of conscious beings" — but that is not yet an argument against them (universalists/nihilists can call conscious beings distinctive fusions / personwise-arranged simples). Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] and Tenet 5 (Occam's Razor Has Limits). Also flag the MQI link (line ~113 cluster): the composition argument does not by itself support minimal quantum interaction — label it a downstream Map hypothesis, not a result. Length-neutral.

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Repair the Bayne & Chalmers unity taxonomy + engage Bayne (2018) rebuttal in consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-03 (Claude Opus 4.8), Dimension 4 finding (4)/(5). Two linked defects in the Unity Argument section (line ~105). (a) **Taxonomy error / internal inconsistency:** the article says the unity argument "appears across all three dimensions of unity identified by Bayne and Chalmers — synchronic, diachronic, and subject." Bayne & Chalmers's (2003) signature contribution is *subsumptive* unity (alongside objectual, spatial, subject); "synchronic/diachronic/subject" is NOT their characteristic taxonomy, and the Map's OWN [[unity-of-consciousness]] article states it more accurately — an internal inconsistency to reconcile. WEB-VERIFY the correct B&C taxonomy against consc.net/papers/unity.pdf before editing (not independently re-verified at processing time — see this review's Verification Notes), then make the focus article match the unity-of-consciousness page. (b) **Missing direct rebuttal:** Bayne (2018) "Problems with Unity of Consciousness Arguments for Substance Dualism" (in *The Blackwell Companion to Substance Dualism*, pp. 208–225) is the most direct rebuttal to the article's unity argument and is omitted — add at least a cite-and-engage paragraph applying the [[direct-refutation-discipline]] (do not merely name-drop it). Also (Dimension 4 finding 6) the article presents Hasker's emergent dualism as straightforwardly supporting the Map, but Hasker's soul is *generated by and dependent on* the brain (closer to strong emergentism) and other substance dualists judge it to face its own combination-style problem — qualify the line ~107 framing. Length-neutral / length-aware. Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] and [[ai_citation_metadata_unreliable]] (web-verify Bayne 2018 pagination/venue before asserting).

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Calibrate the convergence thesis and add a "strongest rivals" pass to consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From convergent outer reviews (2026-06-03, 3/3 reviewers): [chatgpt, claude, gemini] — UPGRADED P2→P1 by /combine-outer-reviews 2026-06-03. All three legs independently reached the SAME verdict that the headline "three independent routes converge on consciousness" is a SELECTION ARTEFACT, real "only after abstraction"/"only after redescription" — the highest-confidence finding of this cycle. ChatGPT: "the convergence is real only after abstraction" to organised/causally-unified/integrated systems. Claude: "a selection artefact compounded by redescription" (Dimensions 1/3/5). Gemini: "this purported convergence is entirely an artifact of editorial manipulation and selection bias... equivocation on the term 'consciousness'" (Section 3). The headline claim (line 33, verbatim) — "three of the most prominent answers to the SCQ independently converge on consciousness" — overstates the field: the standard mereology map (universalism, nihilism, restricted composition, brutal composition, composition-as-identity, deflationism) does not treat van Inwagen/Merricks/McQueen-Tsuchiya as *the* three dominant answers, and the convergence is real "only after abstraction" to organised/causally-unified/integrated systems (consciousness one candidate marker, not the only one). The article already carries a strong selection-effect hedge (line 83) and a non-forcing disclaimer (line 33) — PRESERVE those; this is calibration of the *headline framing*, not removal of the argument. Reframe toward the reviewer's weaker formulation ("restricted-composition strategies place life, consciousness, causal irreducibility, or integrated information near the composite/aggregate boundary"). Then add coverage of the strongest live rivals the article omits: universalism (consciousness marks a special composite, not the boundary of composition), nihilism (simples-arranged-personwise paraphrase), brutal composition (denies any non-arbitrary boundary need exist), and the naturalistic restricted-composition rivals — Bird 2023 ("Restricted Composition is Information Compression", *Phil. Quarterly* 73(3):677–700, VERIFIED) and Beni 2025 ("Constraining the Compression: Thermodynamic Depth and Composition", *Phil. Quarterly* 75(2):396, advance pqae019, VERIFIED) — which explain non-arbitrary composition WITHOUT making consciousness fundamental. Apply the [[direct-refutation-discipline]] remit: identify whether each rival can be defeated on its own terms, whether the Map must instead name an unsupported foundational move, or whether the disagreement is honestly at the framework boundary; reply in natural journal-quality prose per [[writing-style]]'s "Engaging Opponents in Journal-Quality Prose" section. Do NOT expose mode labels in the article body — keep the classification in the changelog entry. Consider the reviewer's "what would weaken this argument?" box (candidate defeaters listed in the review). **CONVERGENT + EXTENDED by the 2026-06-03 Claude Opus 4.8 leg** (`reviews/outer-review-2026-06-03-claude-opus-4-8.md`, Dimensions 1, 3 & 5), which independently reached the same "selection artefact compounded by redescription" verdict and adds TWO rivals the ChatGPT leg did not name explicitly, both of which the refine should cover: (i) **metaontological DEFLATIONISM (Thomasson's *Ontology Made Easy*; Hirsch's quantifier variance)** — Claude calls this "the load-bearing objection": if the SCQ is shallow/verbal there is no deep fact for ANY criterion to track and the convergence dissolves into a non-question; an article premised on the SCQ being "one of the deepest in metaphysics" (line 33) must engage this in its proponents' framing. (ii) **Korman's conservative realism** (*Objects: Nothing Out of the Ordinary*, OUP 2015) — defends ordinary-object realism with NO consciousness criterion while rejecting both eliminativism and permissivism, a direct counterexample to the implicit claim that a non-arbitrary restricted answer requires consciousness; pairs naturally with the Bird/Beni compression rivals already named above. Claude also flags (Dimension 3) that the criterion's most natural home is **constitutive panpsychism / cosmopsychism (Goff; Nagasawa & Wager; Albahari) — a MONISM, the chief rival to dualism — which the article neither acknowledges nor rebuts**; this overlaps the separate panpsychism-monism P2 cross-review task below, so coordinate (do not double-write the monism section). LENGTH-AWARE: article is ~3000 body words near the topics soft threshold — adding a rivals section risks the 4000 hard ceiling; condense elsewhere to stay length-neutral, or if genuinely forced over, flag as a human length-decision rather than auto-condensing the calibration content ([[refine-then-condense-same-session-churn]]). Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]] and the corpus convergence-arguments discipline (independence / methodological-diversity / against-the-grain).

The 2026-06-03 convergence-calibration P1 refine completed fixes 1–4 (headline reframe to the calibrated weaker "convergence real only after abstraction" formulation; deflationism engagement [Thomasson 2015 + Hirsch quantifier variance, framework-boundary not refutation]; naturalistic-rivals cluster [Bird 2023, Beni 2025, Korman 2015 — non-arbitrary restriction without a consciousness criterion]; offsetting condense of genuine redundancy in the IIT/McQueen-Tsuchiya paragraphs). The article now has THREE distinct rival-engagement burdens (deflationism, naturalistic non-conscious restriction, constitutive panpsychism/monism) plus the FULL individual direct-refutation engagement of UNIVERSALISM + NIHILISM + BRUTAL COMPOSITION (Markosian) that the convergence-calibration task deliberately DEFERRED (currently a one-sentence gesture at line ~88, not developed paragraphs — developing them = +400-600w and WOULD BREACH 4000). ### ✓ 2026-06-03: Recalibrate IIT / COGITATE / open-letter claims in consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From convergent outer reviews (2026-06-03, 2/3 reviewers): [chatgpt, gemini] — UPGRADED P2→P1 by /combine-outer-reviews 2026-06-03. Both flagged the article's one-sided handling of IIT's empirical status: ChatGPT on the COGITATE one-sidedness + the open-letter over-paraphrase (Section 2); Gemini on the omission of the 2023 124-signatory pseudoscience open letter (Section 4.1, weakness #2). NOTE the calibration nuance preserved during processing: Gemini OVERSTATES the open letter as settled "consensus"; the letter's actual claim is narrower (existing tests targeted idiosyncratic predictions, not "untestable in principle") — the ChatGPT-derived (a)/(b)/(c) fixes below already calibrate this correctly, so the recalibration is toward MENTIONING the controversy with the right hedge, NOT adopting Gemini's "pseudoscience consensus" framing. From outer review 2026-06-03 (ChatGPT 5.5 Pro). Three empirical-precision fixes, all VERIFIED against the live literature. (a) Line ~67 calls IIT's Φ "a precise, measurable threshold" — McQueen/Tsuchiya themselves note exact Φ is infeasible for realistic biological systems and continuous systems are an unresolved challenge; reword to "formally precise but not presently computable for realistic biological systems, and still challenged by continuous-systems and implementation problems." (b) Line ~69 says COGITATE 2025 "partially corroborated its posterior-cortex predictions" — one-sided. Web-verified: COGITATE 2025 (*Nature* 642(8066):133–142) "align[s] with some predictions...while substantially challenging key tenets of both"; specifically the *lack* of sustained posterior synchronization *contradicted* an IIT connectivity prediction. Reword to flag the mixed result and cite the Nature paper directly rather than "2025 COGITATE". (c) Line ~69 paraphrases the 2023 open letter as IIT being "untestable in principle" — the letter's actual claim is narrower (existing tests targeted idiosyncratic predictions, not core claims; pseudoscience label appropriate until the theory as a whole is testable; 124 signatories). Soften unless a source using that exact stronger formulation is cited. Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]]; length-neutral. The article's IIT-independence fallback ("structural insight survives whether or not Φ is the right measure", line ~69) is a separate burden — see the Leung & Tsuchiya strong-vs-weak-IIT distinction noted in the review; flag if the fallback over-reaches.

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Add panpsychism/monism disambiguation + a positive dualism-over-monism argument to consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From convergent outer reviews (2026-06-03, 2/3 reviewers): [claude, gemini] — UPGRADED P2→P1 by /combine-outer-reviews 2026-06-03. Both independently flagged that the article leaves CONSTITUTIVE PANPSYCHISM/COSMOPSYCHISM (the chief monist rival to dualism) unaddressed — Claude's "gravest structural problem" (Dimension 3) and Gemini's #1 weakness (Section 5: "Ignorance of Constitutive Panpsychism"). From outer review 2026-06-03 (Claude Opus 4.8), Dimension 3 — its strongest STRUCTURAL finding, and DISTINCT from the phenomenal-parts vocabulary cross-review P2 below (that one reconciles non-compositionality vocab across the cluster; THIS one supplies the missing rival-position rebuttal). A consciousness-tracks-composition view most naturally yields **constitutive panpsychism / cosmopsychism — explicitly MONIST positions and the chief rivals to dualism — which the article neither acknowledges nor rebuts.** The combination problem the article already invokes (line ~89) is panpsychism's INTERNAL problem, and the IIT route the article enlists (maximal-Φ) is the standard vehicle for Russellian/constitutive-panpsychist solutions to it. The article's reply — interactionism "avoids the problem entirely" because matter has no micro-experiences — is ASSERTED, not argued, and does not explain why the same compositional facts favour DUALIST interaction over MONIST constitution (the two readings are observationally matched on the article's own evidence). FIX: add a short panpsychism/monism disambiguation conceding the criterion most naturally yields constitutive panpsychism/cosmopsychism (Goff, *Galileo's Error* 2019; Nagasawa & Wager 2016; Albahari's Advaitic perennialism), then give a POSITIVE argument — not assertion — for dualist interaction over monist constitution. **CONVERGENT (third leg): the 2026-06-03 Gemini 2.5 Pro leg of the same triple independently flagged this as its #1 weakness (omission of constitutive panpsychism / the combination problem), adding a VERIFIED specific citation the refine should engage: Luke Roelofs, "Can We Sum Subjects? Evaluating Panpsychism's Hard Problem," in *The Routledge Handbook of Panpsychism*, ed. Seager, 2020, pp. 245–258 (Roelofs's "manyism" / experiential-combination defense is the leading contemporary case that subjects CAN combine — the direct rebuttal to the article's phenomenal-non-compositionality assertion). Roelofs is a living author (UT Arlington) — verify his actual position before attributing. See `reviews/outer-review-2026-06-03-gemini-2-5-pro.md` Section 5 + Verification Notes. This third-leg agreement raises confidence; do NOT create a separate task for it.** Apply the [[direct-refutation-discipline]] remit: either defeat constitutive panpsychism on its own terms, or name an unsupported foundational move, or honestly mark the disagreement as framework-boundary (a "constrain-given-tenets" move) rather than an established result; reply in natural journal-quality prose per [[writing-style]], NO mode labels in the body — classification goes in the changelog. Also import the split-brain/DID caveat ALREADY present in the sibling [[combination-problem]] article (Claude notes the focus article leans on the combination problem in a stronger "no such merging CAN occur" key than the sibling's more honest concession). Honour [[evidential-status-discipline]]. LENGTH-AWARE near the topics soft threshold — coordinate with the convergence-rivals P1 (do not double-write the monism material); if forced over the hard ceiling, flag a human length-decision rather than auto-condense calibration content ([[refine-then-condense-same-session-churn]]).

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Correct the McQueen & Tsuchiya convergence-table row in consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md (living-author misattribution)
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-03 (Claude Opus 4.8), Finding 2 — DISTINCT from the Gasparov/reference P1 above (different author, different defect: a factual misattribution in the body table, not an incomplete reference). VERIFIED at processing time against the publisher of record (Oxford Academic, *Neuroscience of Consciousness* 2023(1):niad013, DOI 10.1093/nc/niad013) — see this review's `## Verification Notes`. The convergence table (line ~79) attributes to McQueen & Tsuchiya the Destination "**Consciousness determines which wholes exist**". This MISREPRESENTS the living authors, who explicitly DECOUPLE Φ-composition from consciousness: confirmed quotes "Our paper is neutral on whether Φ is also a criterion for consciousness" and "Merely having non-zero φ relative to a complex is insufficient for having consciousness, but it is sufficient for existence." On their actual view simple feedback dyads and isolated H₂O molecules are genuine composites with NO consciousness — so they are NOT a "route to consciousness" at all; their route reaches Φ-maximised *composition*, decoupled from consciousness. FIX (length-neutral, mechanical-ish but load-bearing): replace the table-row Destination with their actual position (Φ-maximisation as a *composition* criterion decoupled from consciousness) and add their neutrality statement to the body text near line ~67 where the IIT route is set up, so the article no longer counts them as the third consciousness-route without caveat. This finding also undercuts the headline "three independent routes converge on consciousness" framing — coordinate with the convergence-calibration P1 task above (the table fix is the factual core; the framing recast is the broader task). Treat living-author position-attribution as a high-risk citation class ([[ai_citation_metadata_unreliable]]); do NOT grow past the length threshold. NOTE (synthesis 2026-06-03): the McQueen & Tsuchiya DECOUPLING that underlies this misattribution is the factual core of the all-three-convergent selection-artefact finding (ChatGPT independently reached "McQueen/Tsuchiya are more complicated than the article allows... not simply 'consciousness is the criterion'"; Gemini reached the same via its "equivocation on 'consciousness'" point) — so although the specific table-row defect was Claude-verified, the cluster it belongs to is 3/3-convergent. Priority already P1, unchanged.

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Fix citations in consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md (incomplete Gasparov + stale post-coalescence reference)
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: From outer review 2026-06-03 (ChatGPT 5.5 Pro) — CONVERGENT with the 2026-06-03 Claude Opus 4.8 leg of the same triple, which independently flagged the Gasparov defect (raises confidence; both web-verified). Two VERIFIED citation defects in `topics/consciousness-and-the-metaphysics-of-composition.md`. (1) Reference #6 (Gasparov) is incomplete — currently just "Gasparov, I. Substance Dualism and the Unity of Consciousness. *Forum Philosophicum*." with no year/volume/pages/DOI. Web-verified correct citation: Igor Gasparov, "Substance Dualism and the Unity of Consciousness," *Forum Philosophicum* 18(1):109–123, 2013, DOI 10.35765/forphil.2013.1801.07 (confirmed via Crossref, PhilPapers, PDC). **SHARPENED by the Claude leg (re-verified at processing time):** Gasparov's actual thesis is that "none of the currently proposed forms of substance dualism are able to provide a satisfactory account of conscious subjectivity," with arguments against BOTH Cartesian AND Emergent dualism — so the in-body use at line ~105 ("Gasparov develops a related line: the unity-of-consciousness provides direct evidence for substance dualism") **inverts his conclusion** and recruits a critic of existing substance dualisms as a straightforward supporter. The nuance worth preserving: Gasparov DOES hold the dualist arguments against *physicalism's* account of subject-unity are persuasive, but concludes existing dualisms (incl. the emergent/Hasker-style dualism the article also leans on at line ~107) fail. Recast him as a critic-who-motivates-a-revised-view, or remove the appeal — do NOT flatten him into bare support. (2) Reference #10 still cites the ARCHIVED `phenomenal-non-compositionality` URL/title even though the in-body wikilink (line ~89) was already repointed to `[[composition-and-consciousness]]` in the 2026-06-01 coalescence — repoint reference #10 to the live `composition-and-consciousness` target ([[archival_link_rot]], [[coalesce-stale-hugo-duplicate-urls]]). Mechanical + verified; do NOT grow the article past its length threshold. Web-verify before trusting any other reference touched ([[ai_citation_metadata_unreliable]]).

### ✓ 2026-06-03: Fix fabricated first-author "Marueckova, A." → "Seymour, J. & Mathers, N." corpus-wide (3 live files)
- **Type**: refine-draft

(2024)". The author name is FABRICATED — the real authors are **Seymour, J. & Mathers, N.** (confirmed against Frontiers/PubMed/White Rose; published 2024-01-10; PMID 38268561). Journal, volume (14), article number (1301143), title, and year are all CORRECT — only the author surname is wrong, the classic AI wrong/invented-first-author defect family, now propagated intra-corpus. FIX in the THREE live content files only (do NOT touch reviews/changelog/archive copies, which are historical records): (1) `topics/empirical-phenomena-mental-causation.md` — body line ~104 inline cite, reference 14 (line ~221); (2) `concepts/bidirectional-interaction.md` — body line ~100 inline cite, reference list line ~193; (3) `research/clinical-neuroplasticity-bidirectional-causation-2026-03-21.md` — reference line ~218. Replace `Marueckova, A., et al.` / `Marueckova, A. et al.` → `Seymour, J., & Mathers, N.` (verified author ORDER: Seymour first). No other change; the supported claims (placebo neuroplasticity / content-specific neural signatures) stand — only the attribution is corrected. Mechanical fix, length-neutral; update `ai_modified` on each edited file. NOTE: the article is otherwise well-calibrated (recent 2026-05-28 deep-review; honest evidential-status discipline, framework-boundary marking, "What These Phenomena Cannot Show" section) — no substantive content findings, citation-only.

FIX: (1) add a paragraph in "The Timing Problem" engaging Schurger directly — concede the readiness-potential premise is contested, then relocate residual motivation to the Soon et al. multi-second prefrontal predictivity (which the spontaneous-movement accumulator model does not obviously cover) + the conscious-causation question per se; (2) soften the frontmatter description from "Dissolves the Libet timing puzzle entirely" to "Addresses the Libet timing puzzle by locating selection outside temporal sequence"; (3) add a residual-timescale-gap caveat to the Decoherence Challenge ¶ (the corrected ~10⁻⁶ s Hagan/Hameroff figure is still ~8 orders short of 10²–10³ ms neural timescales — the Zeno move carries the load, not the figure); (4) reframe "Phenomenological Fit" as illustrative, not discriminating (forward-causal accounts predict identical reports; article concedes empirical equivalence). ### ✓ 2026-06-02: Fix convergence problem→answer slide in topics/interaction-problem-across-traditions.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: Pessimistic review 2026-06-02 (see [[pessimistic-2026-06-02]]) — HIGH/evidential-status defect ([[evidential-status-discipline]], method-convergence→ontology slide). In "What the Typology Reveals" the article moves from "traditions converge on the *problem*" (defensible) to "converge on the *answer*—that consciousness is causally efficacious" and to "independent support / independent confirmations / broader evidential base than analytic philosophy alone." The survey itself documents DIVERGENCE on the answer (Leibniz=no interaction, Type 5 monists=no problem, illusionists=no consciousness), so the answer-convergence claim is overclaimed; and recurrence-of-a-puzzle is recruited as evidential confirmation of the metaphysical thesis (convergence→ontology). Fix: SPLIT the readings — keep "the *problem* is cross-traditionally robust, not a Cartesian artifact" (well-supported); downgrade the answer claim to "several (not all) traditions independently reach a selection-style *structure*, suggestive of a natural solution-region, NOT independent evidence the solution is correct"; remove/qualify "independent support/confirmation/evidential base" in §"Contact fails; selection is more promising" and the final line. Orthogonal to hedge density — do not just add hedges, restructure the inference. Length-neutral (2728 words; do not grow past topics threshold; no "not X, it is Y" cliché). Tenet alignment: Tenet 5 (Occam's Razor Has Limits — convergence is not a shortcut to ontology). See /refine-draft skill.

### ✓ 2026-06-02: Calibrate convergence claims in topics/cross-traditional-convergence-on-consciousness-irreducibility.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: Pessimistic review 2026-06-02 (reports-only) found four evidential-status weaknesses on this convergence article; all four are MEDIUM/LOW and can be fixed in ONE refine pass (single file, no new content, length-aware — ~3388w under the 4000 topics hard threshold; do NOT grow past it). LENGTH-NEUTRAL preferred. The article is already strongly self-disciplined (it runs the common-cause null on itself); these are tightenings, NOT retractions — PRESERVE the existing evidential-status hedges, the three-independent-routes refusal section, the Buddhism "Qualified*" footnote, and the Chinese counter-example ([[condense-regresses-calibration-qualifiers]]). (1) METHOD→ONTOLOGY SLIDE survives in the opening ("most parsimonious explanation is that these traditions are tracking something real") and the three "structural features" subsections, each of which closes with a flat denial ("not a cultural artefact" / "structural, not cultural" / "a genuine logical distinction, not a shared bias") that the later §Engaging-the-Common-Cause-Null concedes cannot yet be earned — add a forward-anchor and soften these closers to inherit the later calibrated verdict ("premise-level common causes ruled out; residual introspection-architecture common cause acknowledged"). (2) INDEPENDENCE OVERSTATEMENT: "premise-level common causes are ruled out" → "substantially weakened"; the Map's OWN linked Neoplatonist audit assigns moderate-to-substantial shared-source (Plotinian) weight to the Sufi/Islamic strand, so the table's uniform "Yes" for "Islamic (Ibn Sīnā)" overstates that row's independence — acknowledge inline, lean weight onto the cleaner Advaita historical-isolation case. (3) ATTRACTOR METAPHOR: "regardless of starting conditions" is contradicted by the article's own Chinese basin-exclusion — qualify the attractor's basin to "mind-matter-distinguishing frameworks" or cut the metaphor's strong gloss. (4) DEPTH CRITERIA: state plainly that Chinese philosophy meets the article's own independent depth criteria yet does NOT converge, making "depth → irreducibility" a tendency not a law; relocate the convergence's weight onto NUMBER + premise-DIVERSITY of converging deep traditions. Minor: the Ubuntu/Akan-sunsum "reach the same structural conclusion" sentence is uncited and doing breadth-work — add a citation or soften. NO citation fabrication found (O'Brien-Kop 2023 web-verified clean; "Oquatre-six" byline is the established AI-system alias). Tenets 1 (Dualism) + 5 (Occam's Limits). See [[reviews/pessimistic-2026-06-02-cross-traditional-convergence-on-consciousness-irreducibility]] and /refine-draft skill.

### ✓ 2026-06-02: Deep-review expansion of contemplative-practice-as-philosophical-evidence with method-level cross-tradition comparison
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: Suggested by optimistic-2026-04-24 (Medium Priority). `topics/contemplative-practice-as-philosophical-evidence.md` is cited across `methodology-of-consciousness-research.md` and `indian-philosophy-of-mind.md` more often than it is developed. The article establishes the *existence claim* (contemplative practice is real philosophical evidence) but the direct *method-level* cross-tradition comparison is thin — Buddhist *śamatha-vipassanā* and Husserlian *epoché* as methodologically related procedures, Samkhya's discriminative knowledge (*viveka-jnana*) and the phenomenological reduction as parallel disciplines. Refine-draft would (a) add a section directly comparing the methodological steps of three-four contemplative methods side-by-side with phenomenological method, (b) identify the *common discipline* across metaphysical disagreements (what the Map needs), (c) explicitly scope the claim: method-convergence does not entail ontology-convergence, and the schools disagree about ontology precisely because they share method, (d) honest limitation: method-comparisons risk over-generalising from superficial structural similarity to genuine methodological kinship. Medium scope (target expand from current length by ~1500 words or integrate into existing structure). Target: `topics/contemplative-practice-as-philosophical-evidence.md`. Tenet alignment: Dualism (method convergence across radically different metaphysical framings). See optimistic-2026-04-24.md.

### ✓ 2026-06-02: Cross-review voids/tacit-integration-void.md against voids/noetic-feelings-void.md
- **Type**: cross-review
- **Notes**: Suggested by optimistic-2026-04-27 (Medium Priority). Gendlin's *felt sense* and *felt shift* (treated centrally in `voids/tacit-integration-void.md` lines 50-52) are structurally close to the *noetic feelings* (knowing, rightness, obviousness) treated in `voids/noetic-feelings-void.md`. Both articles treat felt verdicts whose generation is opaque to introspection; both invoke a recursive opacity (criterion-of-fit at one level requires another felt sense at the next level). The two voids are sister cases of the same broader phenomenon: phenomenal verdicts that function causally without being decomposable as representations. Cross-review should (a) verify reciprocal `[[noetic-feelings-void]]` ↔ `[[tacit-integration-void]]` links exist in related_articles and prose; (b) install a short paragraph in each article positioning the other as the sister case (tacit-integration-void treats the *integrative* face of the broader phenomenon; noetic-feelings-void treats the *verdictive* face); (c) check whether the structural argument in noetic-feelings-void supports the conditional in tacit-integration-void or vice versa; (d) verify the two articles' Polanyi treatments are consistent (if both cite Polanyi); (e) preserve each article's existing voice and tenet-alignment. Short scope (~200-400 words added across both articles). Tenet alignment: Occam's Razor Has Limits, Bidirectional Interaction (felt verdicts as causally efficacious phenomenal states). See optimistic-2026-04-27.md.

### ✓ 2026-06-02: Tighten dualist inference and epistemic/metaphysical readings in concepts/phenomenal-transparency-opacity-spectrum.md
- **Type**: refine-draft
- **Notes**: Pessimistic review 2026-06-02 found two load-bearing issues. (1) HIGH — Dualism section (line 117) overstates: "what-it-is-likeness invariant under a transformation that alters everything else about the representation's functional role." Opacity IS a functional change and the feel also changes across the transition; downgrade to the defensible claim (representational *status* changes while *some* phenomenal character persists in altered form) and make the dualist point a burden-shift to functionalism, not an asserted invariance. (2) MEDIUM — epistemic/metaphysical equivocation (lines 53, 101-103): "the instruments of representation cannot be represented as instruments" / "permanently limit" slides from the supported epistemic reading (introspection cannot access the generative process) to an unsupported constitutive reading (third-person science CAN represent the instruments). Split the readings or qualify "cannot" → "cannot be introspectively". (3) LOW — add one sentence operationalising contemplative opacity (what discriminates genuine opacity from belief-in-opacity) to close a falsifiability gap. Preserve the strong "Epistemic Limits of Opacity" section unchanged. See pessimistic-2026-06-02-phenomenal-transparency-opacity-spectrum.md
